title: Capitals
headline: Capitals earns a second look
caption:
Capitals is specific enough to stop the scroll even before the joke fully registers. It pulls from geography. It is the kind of design that rewards curiosity and a slightly strange sense of humor. https://thirdstringshirts.myspreadshop.com/capitals?idea=5d9690ce136151713cc6fda2 Reply if you get the reference.
